title: COVID-19 Pandemic Tracker Update — Apr 19, 2026
summary: BA.3.2 'Cicada' variant — with 70–75 spike protein mutations — has spread to 33+ countries and disproportionately infects children aged 3–15 at 5x the rate of adults, though severity remains comparable to prior Omicron subvariants. A Nature Immunology study from the Helmholtz Centre identified the 'LC-Mo' immune cell state as a biological driver of Long COVID fatigue and respiratory symptoms, advancing treatment research for an estimated 65 million affected globally. The timeline has been updated with post-pandemic developments including the House Select Subcommittee's December 2024 lab leak conclusion, the WHO Pandemic Agreement adopted May 2025, and ongoing origins debates. Political figures updated with RFK Jr. as HHS Secretary and Trump's second-term COVID stance.

title: COVID-19 Pandemic Tracker Update — Mon Apr 13, 2026
summary: The BA.3.2 'Cicada' SARS-CoV-2 variant has been confirmed in at least 33 countries as of mid-April 2026, establishing itself as a significant new global wave.

title: COVID-19 Pandemic Tracker Update — Thu Apr 2, 2026
summary: BA.3.2 'Cicada' Variant Found to Disproportionately Infect Children.

title: COVID-19 Pandemic Tracker Update — Wed Mar 25, 2026
summary: Scientists Identify 'LC-Mo' Immune Cell Linked to Long COVID Fatigue.
